rules: Headings: Work Sans. Weight 500/600. Tight tracking.
Data/IDs: JetBrains Mono. Use for Ticket IDs, timestamps, and status codes.

usage.general: Strict Monochrome. No gradients. No colored backgrounds for containers.

status_indicators.success: Text-only 'PUBLISHED' or Black badge with white text.
status_indicators.error: Text-only 'CANCELLED' with strikethrough or simple error icon.

layout.structure: Sidebar Navigation + Top Header + Main Content Area

grid_system.kanban: flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6 overflow-x-auto h-full

sidebar.style: border-r border-border bg-background fixed h-full z-30

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border rounded-sm shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-medium px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-background border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm font-medium px-4 py-2

inputs.style: flex h-9 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use @radix-ui/react-icons for specific UI needs if missing.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Very subtle. shadow-sm for cards. shadow-md for dropdowns.
visual_enhancers.patterns: Use striped backgrounds for data visualization backgrounds (very subtle grey stripes) if needed for differentiation.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure strictly high contrast (Black on White).
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Use generous spacing (p-8+) for the dashboard container.
Dark mode strategy: Invert colors. White text on Black background. Borders become dark grey.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install Lucide React, Recharts (for dashboard metrics), and Sonner.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_strategy: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component that includes the Sidebar and Topbar. Wrap all protected routes in this.
instructions_to_main_agent.auth_strategy: Create a 'LoginPage' with split layout. Left: Aesthetic/Logo. Right: Form.
instructions_to_main_agent.state_management: Use Context API or Zustand for global state (User, Notifications).
instructions_to_main_agent.mock_data: Create a 'lib/mockData.js' file to populate the Dashboard, Suggestions, and Tickets until backend is ready.
